summary: Completed testing of Upcoming Tasks feature. Backend API (GET /api/athlete/tasks) and Frontend UI both fully working. All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend displays tasks correctly with proper icons, badges, and navigation.

issues: ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin errors for external university logo resources - cosmetic only, not blocking functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Upcoming Tasks feature fully working. The tasks endpoint generates tasks from: overdue follow-ups, due-today, due-soon (1-3 days), first outreach needs, and profile completion. Frontend shows up to 5 tasks with color-coded icons and priority badges.

tasks_endpoint: Each task has required fields: task_id, type, priority, title, description, link
Tasks sorted by priority (high first) then by urgency (most overdue first)
task_types_validation: follow_up_overdue: has negative days_diff, high priority

upcoming_tasks_section: Shows CheckSquare icon and 'Upcoming Tasks' heading
task_item_display: Colored icons: Clock (red) for overdue, Clock (amber) for due today, Mail (teal) for outreach
other_features_working: Kanban board displays with 5 columns and 12 cards
Hero card 'Actions Needed Today' carousel working (2 items)

example_tasks.title: Send first outreach to University of Tampa
Send first outreach to Emory University
Send first outreach to Brigham Young University
